prompt: Create a high-quality vertical anime illustration of Reina, a Japanese high school girl taking a close-up arm-extended selfie inside a sunlit classroom. She has very long flowing dark forest green hair with pale mint-green tips, glossy layered strands, and one hand raised near her temple as if adjusting her hair. Her face is intentionally covered by a large centered opaque square censor block with a muted gray-to-beige color, hiding all facial features from forehead to chin. She wears a neat navy school uniform blazer with gold buttons, a crisp white shirt, and a large deep red ribbon bow at the collar, with a pleated navy skirt partially visible. The camera angle is a dynamic wide-angle selfie perspective from slightly above and in front, with her extended left arm dominating the lower-left foreground and her torso centered. Background: a bright empty classroom with wooden desks and chairs, a green chalkboard on the left, tall windows on the right, warm morning sunlight streaming in, soft bloom, dust motes, and gentle depth of field. Style: polished modern anime key visual, detailed hair highlights, clean line art, soft painterly shading, warm cinematic lighting, vertical 3:4 composition, no text, no watermark, no extra characters.
